summary: Senior Cloud Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise technology experience and strong hands-on depth in Python, SQL, ETL pipeline design, Oracle data platforms, AWS data services, and production support. Experienced building automated data pipelines, reporting datasets, monitoring workflows, and performance/capacity analytics in regulated financial-services environments. Strong fit for cloud data engineering roles requiring AWS S3/Glue/Athena/Redshift, data quality, governance, monitoring, documentation, disaster-recovery awareness, and stakeholder-facing delivery. Currently expanding multi-cloud and Kubernetes knowledge while grounding delivery in proven AWS, Python, SQL, data modeling, and operational reliability experience.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing manual reporting processes with repeatable data workflows for capacity, risk, and technology-usage analysis.

Built hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform patterns using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL concepts, Athena-style query access, and Redshift migration patterns to support scalable forecasting and analytics workloads.
Designed optimized Oracle schemas, historical retention structures, and reporting datasets to support seasonal capacity forecasting, executive reporting, and long-term infrastructure analysis.
Implemented data quality, reconciliation, and validation logic across telemetry and capacity datasets to improve trust in reporting outputs used by senior stakeholders.

Monitored production data workflows, investigated pipeline failures and data anomalies, and contributed to operational readiness through automation, troubleshooting, runbooks, and stakeholder communication.

Integrated monitoring feeds from BMC TrueSight/TSCO, CA Wily APM, and AppDynamics into unified reporting layers, enabling trend analysis, performance optimization, and cost-aware infrastructure decisions.
Containerized Python ETL jobs on EC2/ECS and worked with CI/CD-aware deployment patterns, supporting repeatable delivery of data-processing and forecasting workloads.
Developed Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, and plotly dashboards that surfaced capacity, utilization, performance, and cost-optimization insights for technical and executive audiences.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical hospitality systems, supporting performance visibility and operational reporting for revenue-impacting applications.
Led the FAST project, data-mining real-user and synthetic performance metrics to generate actionable optimization recommendations for engineering teams.
Implemented End-User Monitoring and transaction tracing across web and mobile experiences, improving visibility into performance bottlenecks and user-impacting issues.
Participated in AWS cloud migration planning and APM readiness assessment, translating operational telemetry into infrastructure and application recommendations.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for a large financial-services environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents across production systems.
Built Perl and Korn Shell extraction scripts that automated performance reporting and reduced manual weekly export effort.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and management modules adopted as standards across client environments.
Partnered with J2EE/WebLogic performance teams to troubleshoot production bottlenecks and document operational procedures for support teams.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster, preserving performance while reducing infrastructure footprint.
Automated schema conversion and data validation pipelines to ensure data integrity throughout phased migration and cutover activities.
Optimized C++/OCCI/OCI transaction processing and SQL access patterns to maintain sub-second query latency under high-volume workloads.
Built validation and test automation to verify migration correctness across large transaction datasets.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PySpark, PL/SQL, Java, Scala concepts, Perl, Korn Shell, JSON, XML

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python/PySpark forecasting and analytics platform for banking-scale infrastructure telemetry. The system transformed raw monitoring data into trusted reporting datasets, capacity insights, utilization scores, and forecasting outputs for infrastructure and technology stakeholders.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform pattern using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, and Bedrock concepts. Focused on ingestion, transformation, columnar storage, metadata/catalog thinking, data access, and AI-enabled analytics patterns.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end Python automation pipeline using LLM APIs, semantic duplicate detection, JSON artifacts, quality gates, and application tracking. Demonstrates CI/CD-aware automation, pipeline orchestration, data validation, and AI-assisted workflow design.
